metadata.description: HerbertGao's self-hosted AI coding skills marketplace.

plugins.name: review-loop
plugins.description: Adversarial review loop for Claude Code — runs Codex rescue + Code Reviewer + Reality Checker in parallel over your proposal and diff, merges/triages findings, dispatches minimal fixes, and re-reviews until pass or cap.

plugins.name: opsx
plugins.description: Orchestrated OpenSpec apply — the main agent groups pending tasks by scope and dispatches a worker per group (parallel then serial by dependency), only managing OpenSpec state and reviews; it never writes implementation code itself. Ships /opsx:apply-subagent (Claude subagent worker) with its SOT skill.
